description_long: This humanoid robot features a metallic, segmented body with a rounded head, a rectangular blue-tinted faceplate, and a broad chest panel. Its arms are composed of flexible, ribbed tubing ending in simple, pointed hands, while the legs are jointed and robust, with visible mechanical springs or actuators at the knees and ankles. The robot stands on a circular, sandy-colored base, suggesting it is designed for stability on urban surfaces. The overall design is sleek and functional, with a silvery finish and blue highlights that give it a modern, approachable appearance. The robot's proportions and posture are distinctly humanoid, with a clear separation between torso, limbs, and head. No external clothing or accessories are present, emphasizing its utilitarian, industrial aesthetic.
description: A sleek, silver humanoid robot with blue highlights, ribbed arms, and jointed legs, standing on a sandy base. Its design is modern and functional, with a blue faceplate and no external clothing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the robot's blue faceplate, broad chest, ribbed arms, and both legs standing on the sandy base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the torso, the mechanical joints in the legs, and the profile of the head and arms.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth back, the attachment points of the arms and legs, and the absence of facial features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the leg articulation, ribbed arm structure, and the back of the head.
attribute_pose: The robot is standing upright with its arms slightly bent outward at the elbows and legs straight, feet flat on the base. The head is facing forward, and the torso is upright.
attribute_clothing_style: The robot is unclothed, featuring only integrated metallic panels and blue-tinted faceplate with no decorative elements.
attribute_facial_features: The face consists of a rectangular blue-tinted faceplate with no visible mouth or nose, and two glowing blue eye-like shapes. No expressive or movable facial features are present.
attribute_limb_articulation: The arms have at least two visible articulation points (shoulder and elbow) with ribbed, flexible tubing, while the legs have three (hip, knee, ankle) with mechanical joints and springs. The limbs appear to allow a moderate range of motion.
attribute_presence_of_sensors: Visible sensors include two blue eye-like elements on the faceplate, likely functioning as cameras or visual sensors. No other sensors are visible.
